text.title: PWA Development Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Note-taking PWA with offline editor
example.note: manifest: name+short_name+start_url=/+display=standalone+theme_color+icons 192/512/maskable. SW scope=/, skip_waiting=true, clients_claim=true. cache_plan: /api/notes/* stale-while-revalidate 300s 200 entries; / network-first 3s timeout; /static/* cache-first 86400s. update_strategy: user prompt 'New version - reload' + auto_reload=false. offline_page=/offline.html. Lighthouse PWA=100; users get latest code within one prompt of deploy.

example.title: Stale-shell horror
example.note: Engineer set SW to cache-first on /. Users locked on v1 forever; new login flow never reached them. Tree caught both: shell-not-cache-first (forbidden) + update-flow-explicit (no prompt). Fix: rewrite cache_plan + add prompt.
